note: Phase 4a back-half state, per repo (schema: ../../../../skills/sdlc-author-epic/references/state-schema.md). S03 is multi-repo (backend + mobile), in-build: one task shipped per repo through Phase 3's manual gates. `checks` has been EARNED to machine_advance — its trust slice in trust-log.json is 5 runs, 100% approved-unchanged, clearing automation.trust_threshold (>=5 runs, >=0.8 unchanged). So the next task on either repo auto-advances on a clean gate pass, stopping at engineer-review (locked, human). `spec`/`tasks`/`implement` stay human_approve (Phase 4b earns their advance).
